chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Tr. Application No.S-58 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.2216/2019 2. For orders on MA No.2217/2019 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on MA No.2218/2019 10-05-2019 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, D.P.G.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Notice issued to applicant has received back un-served with the endorsement that the applicant was not present at his house, however, he was informed about the date of hearing on his mobile phone who undertook to attend the Court, however, the applicant is called absent. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
